03 / Experience

Where I've Made Impact

2025 — PRESENT
Senior Business Developer & Data Analytics Consultant
AP3SI (Government Contractor) — Alexandria, VA
  • Partner with federal clients to translate business requirements into scalable BI solutions using Power BI, SSAS, and Oracle 19c.
  • Develop and deploy interactive executive dashboards leveraging DAX and Power Query for performance tracking and financial management.
  • Integrate and model data from multiple enterprise systems using Azure Data Factory and SQL stored procedures.
  • Build PowerApps and Power Automate workflows to streamline reporting processes and data governance operations.
2025 — 2025
Senior Program Analyst — Suicide Prevention Program
Veterans Health Administration — Alexandria, VA
  • Maintained and enhanced the National Strategy for Suicide Prevention (NSSP) Dashboard using R ShinyApp.io for senior leadership visibility.
  • Integrated data pipelines and metrics tracking frameworks to evaluate national program performance and guide strategic interventions.
  • Collaborated with clinical and policy stakeholders to align dashboard analytics with public health objectives.
2023 — 2025
Operations Research Systems Analyst
Department of Defense — Defense Suicide Prevention Office (DSPO) — Alexandria, VA
  • Created and maintained real-time Power BI dashboards visualizing suicide trends across six military branches, directly influencing updates to national defense policy.
  • Executed complex SQL integrations across multiple databases to unify data sources and ensure reliable analytics for policy development.
  • Streamlined reporting workflows by developing centralized repositories and automated pipelines, reducing redundancy across business systems.
2021 — 2023
Data & Compliance Analyst
Byte Back Inc. — Washington, D.C.
  • Designed Power BI dashboards monitoring grant performance and funding KPIs across the organization.
  • Used Pandas and SQL for ETL and data validation, improving overall data quality by 60%.
  • Analyzed scholar retention data to identify drop-off points and implemented interventions that improved retention by 52%.
  • Led Salesforce data migration and cleanup, ensuring timely movement of information for efficient operations.
2019 — 2021
DEI Policy & Data Governance Analyst
City of Tallahassee — Tallahassee, FL
  • Built enterprise-wide Power BI dashboards to monitor procurement metrics and track progress against governance objectives.
  • Applied econometric techniques (Regression, ANOVA) to transform complex economic datasets into strategic insights for city leadership.
  • Conducted compliance reviews and data governance audits to support city-wide adherence to federal and local regulations.
  • Led data storytelling workshops to communicate complex insights to non-technical audiences.
